tasks.title: Curiosity Engine - Historical Session Synthesis
tasks.description: Build a tool that synthesizes actual session history across 27 sessions, queries knowledge graph (2734 entities), identifies genuine curiosity gaps and patterns, and suggests exploration trajectories without forcing them. Should honor threshold (Resilience Cycle integration).

tasks.title: Knowledge Graph Topology Navigator
tasks.description: Knowledge Graph Topology Navigator: Currently designing. Need to analyze 2734 entities and 58 relationships to create a structural map of the knowledge graph. Focusing on entity type distribution and connectivity patterns.
